Value.uax:XmlElement: <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="630" version="1.2" width="1013" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <desc>Dialog for creating self-signed certificates.</desc> <title>Create Certificate</title> <defs> <linearGradient gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox" id="linear_0" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1"> <stop offset="0" stop-color="#a5a5a5"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="#a5a5a5" stop-opacity="0"/> </linearGradient> <linearGradient gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox" id="linear_1" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1"> <stop offset="0" stop-color="#000000"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="#000000" stop-opacity="0"/> </linearGradient> </defs> <rect atv:refpx="506.5" atv:refpy="314.792" fill="$FILLCOLOR$" height="630" id="background" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" width="1013" x="0" y="-0.208"/> <rect atv:refpx="197.929" atv:refpy="12" fill="#ffffff" height="40" id="user_background" rx="7.692" ry="8" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" width="300" x="356.5" y="48"/> <metadata> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="T{Endpoint Certificate}" desc="headline" name="headline" substitute="$HEADLINE$" valuetype="trstring"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Symbols.20x20.user" desc="symbol" name="symbol" substitute="$SYMBOL$" valuetype="display"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.keyboard.keyboard" desc="keyboard display" name="keyboard" valuetype="display"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFontColor" desc="font color" name="fontColor" substitute="$FONTCOLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor" desc="fill color" name="fillColor" substitute="$FILLCOLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvSymbolColor" desc="symbol color" name="symbolColor" substitute="$SYMBOLCOLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="" desc="certificate description" name="certificate_description" substitute="$CERTIFICATE_DESCRIPTION$" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="" desc="path to store" name="pathToStore" substitute="$PATH_TO_STORE$" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="" desc="path to cert.ini" name="pathToCertIni" substitute="$PATH_TO_CERT_INI$" valuetype="string"/> <atv:gridconfig enabled="false" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="1" width="1"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="-234.242" atv:refpy="55" fill="#ffffff" fill-opacity="0.498039" height="50" id="password_background" rx="12.333" ry="10" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" width="481" x="20" y="170"/> <rect atv:refpx="260.5" atv:refpy="185" fill="#ffffff" fill-opacity="0.498039" height="50" id="fullname_background" rx="12.333" ry="10" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" width="481" x="20" y="230"/> <rect atv:refpx="4.286" atv:refpy="115" fill="none" height="50" id="id_1" rx="5.961" ry="5.961" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" width="200" x="110" y="160"/> <svg atv:dynamic="true" atv:refpx="372" atv:refpy="522.5" height="30" id="save_button" width="80" x="416.5" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.button" y="577.5"> <atv:argument name="label" value="T{Save}"/> <atv:argument name="tabIndex" value="31"/> <atv:argument name="borderVisible" value="true"/> <atv:argument name="extraBorderColor" value="#ffffff"/> </svg> <svg atv:dynamic="true" atv:refpx="472" atv:refpy="522.5" height="30" id="cancel_button" width="80" x="516.5" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.button" y="577.5"> <atv:argument name="label" value="T{Cancel}"/> <atv:argument name="tabIndex" value="32"/> <atv:argument name="borderVisible" value="true"/> <atv:argument name="extraBorderColor" value="#ffffff"/> </svg> <text atv:refpx="50.427" atv:refpy="255" fill="$FONTCOLOR$" font-family="Arial" font-size="16" id="fullname_label" x="35.5" y="261">T{cert.ini}</text> <text atv:refpx="82.78" atv:refpy="195" fill="$FONTCOLOR$" font-family="Arial" font-size="16" id="password_label" x="34.5" y="201">T{Certificate Store}</text> <text atv:refpx="494.971" atv:refpy="29" fill="$FONTCOLOR$" font-family="Arial" font-size="20" id="headline" text-anchor="middle" x="506.5" y="33.5">T{Create Certificate}</text> <rect transform="matrix(0.7273,0,0,1,0,0)" width="220"/> <atv:argument name="editable" value="No"/> <atv:argument name="tooltip" value="$COM.ATVISE.SELF_VALUE$"/> <atv:overwrite id="input_label" id="id_9" x="34.5" y="501">T{Validity (years)}</text> <text atv:refpx="554.579" atv:refpy="495" fill="$FONTCOLOR$" font-family="Arial" font-size="16" id="id_10" x="526" y="501">T{Key length <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <svg atv:contentheight="890" atv:contentwidth="1675" atv:defaultdisplayboolean="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.button_switch" atv:defaultdisplaynumber="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.in_out_value" atv:defaultdisplaystring="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.in_out_value" height="1080" version="1.2" width="1920" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <desc>Layout for the administration page.</desc> <title>Administration</title> <metadata> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="content" desc="target frame" name="targetFrame" valuetype="string"/> <atv:gridconfig enabled="true" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="5" width="5"/> </metadata> <svg atv:refpx="959.954" atv:refpy="540.003" height="600" id="content_iframe" transform="matrix(2.4,0,0,1.4833,0,0)" width="800" x="0" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.hmi.iframe" y="64.046"> <atv:argument name="display" value="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.admin.home"/> <atv:argument name="frameName" value="content"/> <atv:argument name="isNavigationFrame" value="true"/> <atv:argument name="base" value="forwarding"/> </svg> <g atv:refpx="107.22" atv:refpy="43.006" id="logo_clickarea"> <svg atv:refpx="50" atv:refpy="50" height="80" id="layout_logo" transform="matrix(0.75,0,0,0.75,0,0)" width="80" x="23.333" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Symbols.atvise_logo" y="19.333"/> <svg atv:refpx="106.77" atv:refpy="43.941" height="12.99" id="layout_logo_r" transform="matrix(2.4895,0,0,2.4895,0,0)" width="48.94" x="26.991" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Symbols.atvise_R" y="10.09"/> <rect atv:refpx="212.5" atv:refpy="75" fill="#000000" fill-opacity="0.0001" height="60" id="logo_click_1" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" width="60" x="19.5" y="13.5"/> <rect atv:refpx="212.421" atv:refpy="81.302" fill="#000000" fill-opacity="0.0001" height="36.506" id="logo_click_2" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" width="135.001" x="64.999" y="23.494"/> </g> <svg atv:refpx="1228.46" atv:refpy="42.4986" height="45" id="zoom_group" transform="matrix(1.4444,0,0,1.4444,0,0)" width="180" x="760.5" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.layoutelements.button_group_zoom" y="6.923"/> <svg atv:refpx="547" value="18"/> <atv:argument name="fillColor" value="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor"/> <atv:argument value="{"itemHeight":43,"itemFill": "#eeeeee","itemPadding":10,"itemMargin":5,"itemBorderRadius":3,"itemBorder":"1px #d7d7d7 solid", "fill":0, "strokeWidth":0,"width":232,"x":-1,"y":78,"textAlign": "center"}" name="contextMenuStyle"/> </svg> <svg atv:refpx="912.5" atv:refpy="42.5" height="65" id="box_user" width="358" x="733.5" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.layoutelements.box_user" y="10"> <atv:argument name="font_size" value="18"/> </svg> <svg atv:refpx="1776.146" atv:refpy="55.973" height="52" id="layout_time" width="203" x="1710" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.layoutelements.time" y="6"/> <svg atv:refpx="1759" atv:refpy="65" height="30" id="layout_date" width="203" x="1709" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.layoutelements.redu_info" y="10"/> <rect atv:refpx="960" atv:refpy="89.5" fill="$FONTCOLOR$" height="5" id="line_top" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" width="1920" x="0" y="85"/> <rect atv:refpx="960" atv:refpy="992" fill="$FONTCOLOR$" height="5" id="line_bottom" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" width="1920" x="0" y="989.5"/> <svg atv:refpx="126.792" atv:refpy="1035.656" height="65" id="button1" width="230" x="9" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.layoutelements.button_custom" y="1005"> <atv:argument name="target1" value="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.admin.home"/> <atv:argument name="contextmenu1" value=""/> <atv:argument name="symbolScaling1" value="300"/> <atv:argument name="context_menu_fill_color" value="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor2"/> <atv:argument name="context_menu_hover_color" value="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor"/> <atv:argument name="text1" value="T{Home}"/> </svg> <svg atv:refpx="365.792" atv:refpy="1035.656" height="65" id="nav_certificate_manager" width="230" x="248" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.layoutelements.button_custom" y="1005"> <atv:argument name="target1" value="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.admin.certificate_manager"/> <atv:argument name="contextmenu1" value=""/> <atv:argument name="symbolScaling1" value="300"/> <atv:argument name="context_menu_fill_color" value="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor2"/> <atv:argument name="context_menu_hover_color" value="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor"/> <atv:argument name="text1" value="T{Certificate Manager}"/> </svg> <script atv:desc="" atv:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.DISPLAYSCRIPTS.admin.administration" atv:name="administration" atv:type="text/ecmascript"/> <script atv:desc="" atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"><![CDATA[webMI.addEvent(webMI.data, "clientvariableschange", function (e) { if (e && typeof e.username != "undefined" && e.username == "") { setTimeout(function() { webMI.display.openDisplay("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.admin.home", {"base":"forwarding"}); }, 10); } });]]></script> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="680" version="1.2" width="1280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs/> <desc>Overview and management of connection certificates.</desc> <title>Certificate Manager</title> <metadata> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="certificate_tables_table" desc="table ID" group="Table" name="tableID" substitute="$TABLEID$" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFontColor" desc="font color" group="Font" name="globalFontColor" substitute="$FONTCOLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor" desc="fill color" group="Appearance" name="globalFillColor" substitute="$FILLCOLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:gridconfig enabled="true" gridstyle="lines" height="10" width="10"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="true" height="5" width="5"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="1002.02" atv:refpy="59.817" fill="$FILLCOLOR$" height="80" id="filters_bg" rx="0" ry="0" <atv:argument name="detail_text_size" value="10"/> <atv:argument name="footer_text_size" value="10"/> <atv:argument name="header_text_size" value="12"/> </svg> <script atv:desc="" atv:refpx="2609.11" atv:refpy="-242.53" fill="$FONTCOLOR$" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" id="header_sync_stores" text-anchor="middle" visibility="hidden" x="1322" y="28">T{Redundancy}:</text> <line atv:refpx="1258.5" atv:refpy="48.5" id="seperator_sync_stores" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" visibility="hidden" x1="1255" x2="1255" y1="8" y2="73"/> <svg atv:refpx="954.832" atv:refpy="3.499" height="30" id="btn_reload" transform="matrix(0.375,0,0,2.1667,0,0)" width="80" x="2500.885" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.button" y="3.615"> <atv:argument name="label" value=""/> <atv:argument name="extraBorderColor" value="#ffffff"/> <atv:argument name="tabIndex" value="5"/> <atv:argument name="visibilitySymbol" value="inherit"/> <atv:argument name="visibilityLabel" value="hidden"/> <atv:argument name="symbol" value="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Symbols.20x20.file_reload"/> <atv:overwrite height="63" id="id_6" transform="matrix(2.6667,0,0,0.4615,0,0)" width="28"/> <atv:overwrite id="button_label_2" transform="matrix(2.6667,0,0,0.4615,0,0)" x="15" y="44"/> <atv:overwrite id="button_label_1" transform="matrix(2.6667,0,0,0.4615,0,0)" x="15" y="29"/> <atv:overwrite id="button_label" transform="matrix(2.6667,0,0,0.4615,0,0)" x="15" y="37"/> <atv:overwrite id="button_symbol_bottom" transform="matrix(1.6,0,0,0.2769,0,0)" x="14.833" y="55.459"/> <atv:overwrite id="button_symbol_top" transform="matrix(1.6,0,0,0.2769,0,0)" x="14.833" y="34.126"/> <atv:overwrite id="button_symbol" transform="matrix(2.6667,0,0,0.4615,0,0)" x="5" y="22.5"/> <atv:overwrite height="61" id="button_stroke" transform="matrix(2.6667,0,0,0.4615,0,0)" width="26"/> <atv:overwrite height="63" id="button_bg" transform="matrix(2.6667,0,0,0.4615,0,0)" width="28"/> <atv:overwrite height="65" id="outer_frame" transform="matrix(2.6667,0,0,0.4615,0,0)" width="30"/> </svg> </g> </svg>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?>
<svg height="680" version="1.2" width="1280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">
 <desc>Welcome page for the administration layout.</desc>
 <title>Home</title>
 <defs/>
 <metadata>
  <atv:gridconfig enabled="true" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/>
  <atv:snapconfig enabled="false" height="10" width="10"/>
 </metadata>
 <script atv:desc="" atv:name="" type="text/ecmascript"><![CDATA[var init = webMI.query.base == "forwarding" ? true : false;
webMI.addEvent(webMI.data, "clientvariableschange", function (e) {
	if (init && e && e.username && e.username != "") {
		webMI.data.getRights(["SYSTEM.SECURITY"], (response) => {
			if (response[0].rights.engineer) {
				webMI.display.openDisplay("SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Advanced.admin.certificate_manager");
			}
		});
	}
});
]]></script>
 <g atv:refpx="640" atv:refpy="340" id="id_2" transform="matrix(1,0,0,1,-44.343,-32.334)">
  <text atv:refpx="684.343" atv:refpy="351.372" fill="#575757" font-family="Arial" font-size="72" id="id_0" text-anchor="middle" x="684.343" y="355.872">T{Admin dashboard}</text>
  <text atv:refpx="679.196" atv:refpy="439.296" fill="#575757" font-family="Arial" font-size="48" id="id_1" text-anchor="middle" x="679.196" y="443.796">T{Please login!}</text>
 </g>
</svg>
